summary: Iteration 4.2 — Re-ran single backend test verifying prompt category rename 'Finishing' -> 'Penyelesaian & Interior' on POST /api/estimate. Test PASSED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4.2 re-tested the rename fix on /app/backend/server.py line 158. The estimate breakdown from POST /api/estimate (bangun_baru/Surabaya/100m2/1 floor/menengah) returned 200 OK with category list containing literal 'Penyelesaian & Interior' and zero occurrences of 'Finishing' or 'MEP'. Live LLM call completed in ~17s. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_4_1_tweaks.py is the canonical regression for this rename.
rca of the issue: Iteration 4.1 failed because /app/backend/server.py line 158 still contained 'Finishing & Interior' in the JSON-schema prompt string sent to the LLM, so the LLM echoed 'Finishing' back in breakdown categories. Main agent applied search_replace to swap the literal to 'Penyelesaian & Interior'. Iteration 4.2 confirms the LLM now returns the Indonesian term consistently and no longer includes 'Finishing' or 'MEP' substrings.
